title: PresenceStatusSetInput derives Default with silent empty-string id
description: mod.rs line 164: PresenceStatusSetInput derives Default. id: &str defaults to "". A default-constructed PresenceStatusSetInput passed to presence_status_set sends a JMAP update keyed on the empty string with no client-side error. MessageCreateInput avoids this by not deriving Default (all fields required). Either remove Default from PresenceStatusSetInput (callers must supply id explicitly) or add a debug_assert!(!self.id.is_empty()) guard at the top of presence_status_set.
close_reason: fixed in k8t review: Default removed from PresenceStatusSetInput
